{{CargoRelic
|name=Ascension's Proof
|class_id=20262
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=[[Minigames|Unlimited Space 2 minigame]]
|description=This proof provided by Unknown Existence is a reward for those who have passed the trial of the reincarnation world, and it is also a proof of their experience and strength, as well as the key to the next world to continue the journey of cultivation.
|fame=15
|art=11
|fth=28
|civ=18
|tech=18
|ss1=Snail ATK +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30
}}

[[Category:Minigames]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
